name: kmu
description: Operator toolkit for a DSGVO-konform AI-Mitarbeiter for the German Mittelstand: E-Rechnung & Mahnwesen (§286 BGB) and Buchhaltung hand-off for the Steuerberater. Legal anchors cited from official sources (gesetze-im-internet.de, BMF); client-facing outputs pause for human approval.
